sections.name: general_audience_abstract
sections.title: General Audience Abstract
sections.instructions: Provide a non-technical summary of the proposed research.

sections.name: technical_abstract
sections.title: Technical Abstract
sections.instructions: Provide a concise technical summary of the proposed research.

sections.name: keywords
sections.title: Keywords
sections.instructions: Provide keywords that are relevant to the proposed research.

sections.name: background_and_specific_aims
sections.title: Background and Specific Aims
sections.instructions: Describe the background and specific aims of the research project.

sections.name: preliminary_data
sections.title: Preliminary Data
sections.instructions: Provide any preliminary data that supports the proposed research.

sections.name: experimental_design_and_methods
sections.title: Experimental Design and Methods
sections.instructions: Describe the experimental design and methods that will be used in the research project.

sections.name: statistical_plan
sections.title: Statistical Plan
sections.instructions: Describe the statistical plan for analyzing the data.

sections.name: figures
sections.title: Figures
sections.instructions: Include any figures that are relevant to the project description. Figures may be embedded within the above sections

sections.name: rationale_and_fit
sections.title: Rationale/Fit with Key Criteria
sections.instructions: Explain how the proposed research aligns with MRA's key criteria and its potential for clinical impact.

sections.name: references
sections.title: References
sections.instructions: List all references cited in the project description.

sections.name: budget_justification
sections.title: Budget Justification
sections.instructions: Provide a detailed justification for all budget items, including personnel, supplies, and other expenses.

sections.name: current_and_pending_support
sections.title: Current and Pending Support
sections.instructions: List all current and pending support for the applicant and, if applicable, key personnel (PIs and Young Investigators for Team Science applications).

sections.name: biosketches
sections.title: Biosketches
sections.instructions: Upload NIH format biosketches for the applicant and all key personnel.

sections.name: mentor_letters
sections.title: Mentor Letters of Support
sections.instructions: Include letters of support from all designated mentors. Confirm independent research program, statement about applicant, mentor's role, mentoring plan, research environment, and institutional support.

sections.name: industry_partner_letter
sections.title: Industry Partner Letter of Support
sections.instructions: Include a letter of support from the industry partner (for Academic-Industry Partnership Award proposals).

sections.name: clinical_protocol_synopsis
sections.title: Clinical Protocol Synopsis
sections.instructions: Attach a brief protocol synopsis (5 pages maximum), along with a timeline and milestones, for proposals involving clinical trials.

sections.name: mra_portfolio_fit
sections.title: MRA Portfolio Fit
sections.instructions: Provide a brief statement of how the proposed research project fits within MRA's overall research portfolio.
